_comment: project-builder composes atoms into a complete DIY project brief. Shortcut atoms let Alex request just a materials list or just step sequence.
description: Complete DIY home decor project brief: snapshot, materials, steps, safety, styling variants, and renter alternatives.

steps.condition: renter_friendly requested or step has permanent modification

note: The user can call any shortcut atom directly without running the full workflow. step-sequence always invokes the licensed-trade safety check per protocols/safety.md.
